'''Erd Lumas''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew a [[AR-25 Bubbleship transport|Bubbleship]] for [[Daedalus Gas Mines]] on [[Genarius]].

Lumas had an unusual affliction in that he was [[Allergy/Legends|allergic]] to the great [[Tree/Legends|trees]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]]. He was unwilling to live on another [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that had trees because they reminded him of the home he could not live on, so he spent nearly ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] as a pilot on a [[Spice/Legends|spice]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]].

Upon visiting [[Genarius]], he fell in love with the freedom of the open skies, and with a beauty of a different kind from Ithor. He loved the air and flying, was enraptured by the shapes that clouds made, and felt that piloting a bubbleship looked like he was towing a cloud of his own.
